channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump says he and Xi agree Iran cannot have nuclear weapons

- Trump says he is losing patience with Iran, did not ask China for favours
- Trump says made ‘fantastic trade deals’ with Xi
